titleStmt.title: SII 26.424: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 424. (A.R. No. 403 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the same prākāra.
This inscription is built in at the bottom.

It records the sale of 1,500 kuḻi of land for a sum of 15 Aṉṟāḍu Naṟkāśu, to the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavadēvar in Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēya, in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu, by certain people of the same place, named Bhāradvāji Kumārasvāmi Tiruppulipagavaṉ, Āttraiyan Tiruvaṇṇāmalai-uḍaiyān Uyyavandāṉ-bhaṭṭaṉ and Āttraiyan Veṇkāḍudēvan Akalaṅkan.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tri(ri)puvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 6 Āvatu malāṭāṉa jaṉanātavaḷa
nāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmateyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr bhāradvāji kumārasvāmi tiruppulippakavaṉum Āttrai
yan tiruvaṇṇāmalaiuṭaiyān Uyyavantāṉpaṭṭaṉum Āttraiyan veṇ kāṭutevan Akalaṅkanum
Ivvaṉaivom nilavilaiyāvaṇam Ivvūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppulippakavatevar koyilil Ādidāsa Ādica
ṇḍeśvaratevarkku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūrk kiḻkaḻaniyil veṇkāṭutevaṉ Akalaṅkaṉ
ceṅkollaiyil kuḻi Aiññūṟum tiruvaṇṇāmalaiyuṭaiyān Uyyavan=tāṉ ceṅkollaiyil kuḻi Aiññūṟu
m kumārasvāmi tiruppulippakavaṉ Ātraiyan Uyyavantaāṉ nāraāyaṇabhaṭṭaṉ pakkal parivatticca ceṅko
llaiyil kuḻi Aiññūṟum Ākakuḻi Āyirattu Aiññūṟum viṟpataṟkku kiḻpāṟk kellai sahaiyāravaratukku
meṟkum teṉpāṟkkellai kaḷar kuṇṭilukku vaṭakkum melpākkellai veṇkāṭu tevaṉ Akala
ṅkaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭa ceṅkollaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai Ūṟukāl vāykālukku teṟkum Āka Iv
vicainta nāṟpper Ellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam Uḷnilam Oḻiviṉṟi patiṉaṟu cāṇkolāl kuḻi Āyirattaiññū
ṟum viṟṟuk kuṭuttukkoḷḷauṭaiya Emmilicainta vilaipporu(ḷ)ḷaṉṟāṭu naṟkkācu 10 5 Ikkācu pati
ṉañcum Āvaṇakkaḷiye ciḻikaiccela Aṟakkoṇṭu veṭṭi muṭṭaiyāḷ Eccoṟu Uḷḷiṭṭa cilliṟaiIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.424 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
